name: MuTeLuv: “Hi” by My Luck
overview: Academic overachiever Er meets his match when Mawin joins his class. When the two are sent away to take an exam that could qualify them for a scholarship abroad, Er's confidence is shaken. In an attempt to control his fate, he contacts an anonymous fortune-teller that makes strange demands of him, and in turn finds himself doing all he can to make icy Mawin like him.
